text: The emptiness of the first room fills me with anticipation, as if the silence is inviting me to project my thoughts onto it. When I walk into the vibrant exhibition space, I am struck by curiosity, and am compelled to ponder the dynamic collision of concepts. The poetic words on the screen resonate with me, capturing the feeling of both uncertainty and possibility that each new environment brings. I sense an active invitation to linger, to let my thoughts mingle with the space, contemplating the intersections of creativity, innovation, and solitude.
